character_dossiers.name: doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in combat at the log-house, defended against pirates, and incapacitated an attacker with a cutlass.

character_dossiers.name: captain
character_dossiers.biography: Led defensive efforts at the log-house, sustained injuries, and issued orders during the battle.

character_dossiers.name: Squire
character_dossiers.biography: Supported the captain during the battle, appeared pale after the conflict.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Fired at attackers during the battle and assisted in defending the log-house.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Knocked unconscious by a pirate during the attack, later found incapacitated at a loophole.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Shot through the head during the battle and died shortly after.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Provided medical care, assessed casualties, and communicated with the group post-battle.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Engaged in combat, assisted in defending the log-house, and participated in post-battle discussions.

character_dossiers.name: Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Led the pirate attack, ordered combatants, and was killed by Gray during the battle.
